channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Reg Austin obituary
item.description: Courageous lawyer who helped Zimbabwe gain independence and oversaw elections in Cambodia and Afghanistan (via The Guardian)

item.title: Protecting lions and people: the biologist dedicated to tackling human-wildlife conflict
item.description: Moreangels Mbizah has blazed a trail in Zimbabwe as the first black African woman to found a conservation organisation in the country (via The Guardian)
item.dc:creator: The Guardian
